description:
Provides access to the synth where the script processor resides.
There are special methods for SynthGroups which only work with SynthGroups

addController.signature: void addController(int channel, int number, int value, int timeStampSamples)
addController.description: Adds a controller to the buffer.

addEffect.signature: ScriptEffect * addEffect(String type, String id, int index)
addEffect.description: Adds a effect (index = -1 to append it at the end).

addMessageFromHolder.description: Adds the event from the given holder and returns a event id for note ons.

addModulator.signature: ScriptModulator * addModulator(int chainId, String type, String id)
addModulator.description: Adds a Modulator to the synth's chain. If it already exists, it returns the index.

addNoteOff.signature: void addNoteOff(int channel, int noteNumber, int timeStampSamples)
addNoteOff.description: Adds a note off to the buffer.

addNoteOn.signature: int addNoteOn(int channel, int noteNumber, int velocity, int timeStampSamples)
addNoteOn.description: Adds a note on to the buffer.

addPitchFade.signature: void addPitchFade(int eventId, int fadeTimeMilliseconds, int targetCoarsePitch, int targetFinePitch)
addPitchFade.description: Adds a pitch fade to the given event ID.

addToFront.description: Adds the interface to the Container's body (or the frontend interface if compiled)

addVolumeFade.signature: void addVolumeFade(int eventId, int fadeTimeMilliseconds, int targetVolume)
addVolumeFade.description: Fades all voices with the given event id to the target volume (in decibels).

attachNote.description: Attaches an artificial note to be stopped when the original note is stopped.

createBuilder.description: Creates a Builder object that can be used to create the module tree.

deferCallbacks.description: Defers all callbacks to the message thread (midi callbacks become read-only).

getAllEffects.description: Returns an array of all effects that match the given regex.

getAllModulators.description: Returns an array of all modulators that match the given regex.

getAttribute.description: Returns the attribute of the parent synth.

getAudioSampleProcessor.description: Returns the child synth with the supplied name.

getChildSynth.description: Returns the child synth with the supplied name.

getChildSynthByIndex.description: Returns the child synth with the given index.

getDisplayBufferSource.description: Returns a reference to a processor that holds a display buffer.

getEffect.description: Returns the Effect with the supplied name. Can only be called in onInit(). It looks also in all child processors.

getIdList.description: Searches the child processors and returns a list with every ID of the given type.

getMidiPlayer.description: Creates a reference to the given MIDI player.

getMidiProcessor.description: Returns the MidiProcessor with the supplied name. Can not be the own name!

getModulator.description: Returns the Modulator with the supplied name. Can be only called in onInit. It looks also in all child processors.

getModulatorIndex.description: Returns the index of the Modulator in the chain with the supplied chainId

getNumChildSynths.description: Returns the number of child synths. Works with SynthGroups and SynthChains.

getNumPressedKeys.description: Returns the number of pressed keys (!= the number of playing voices!).

getRoutingMatrix.description: Creates a reference to the routing matrix of the given processor.

getSampler.description: Returns the first sampler with the name name.

getSliderPackProcessor.description: Returns the sliderpack processor with the given name.

getSlotFX.description: Returns the first slot with the given name.

getTableProcessor.description: Returns the table processor with the given name.

getTimerInterval.description: Returns the current timer interval in seconds.

getWavetableController.description: Creates a object to control the wavetable synthesiser features.

isArtificialEventActive.description: Checks if the artificial event is active

isKeyDown.description: Checks if the given key is pressed.

isLegatoInterval.description: Checks if any key is pressed.

isSustainPedalDown.description: Returns true if the sustain pedal is pressed.

isTimerRunning.description: Checks if the timer for this script is running.

noteOff.description: Sends a note off message. The envelopes will tail off.

noteOffByEventId.description: Sends a note off message for the supplied event ID. This is more stable than the deprecated noteOff() method.

noteOffDelayedByEventId.description: Sends a note off message for the supplied event ID with the given delay in samples.

noteOffFromUI.description: Injects a note off to the incoming MIDI buffer (similar to playNoteFromUI).

playNote.description: Plays a note and returns the event id. Be careful or you get stuck notes!

playNoteFromUI.signature: void playNoteFromUI(int channel, int noteNumber, int velocity)
playNoteFromUI.description: Injects a note on to the incoming MIDI buffer (just as if the virtual keyboard was pressed.

playNoteWithStartOffset.signature: int playNoteWithStartOffset(int channel, int number, int velocity, int offset)
playNoteWithStartOffset.description: Plays a note and returns the event id with the given channel and start offset.

sendController.description: Sends a controller event to the synth.

sendControllerToChildSynths.description: The same as sendController (for backwards compatibility)

setAttribute.description: Sets an attribute of the parent synth.

setFixNoteOnAfterNoteOff.description: Adds a few additional safe checks to prevent stuck notes from note offs being processed before their note-on message.

setMacroControl.description:
Sets one of the eight macro controllers to the newValue.
macroIndex
the index of the macro from 1 - 8
newValue
The range for the newValue is 0.0 - 127.0.

setModulatorAttribute.signature: void setModulatorAttribute(int chainId, int modulatorIndex, int attributeIndex, float newValue)
setModulatorAttribute.description:
Sets a ModulatorAttribute.
chainId
the chain where the Modulator is. GainModulation = 1, PitchModulation = 0
modulatorIndex
the index of the Modulator starting with 0.
attributeIndex
the index of the Modulator starting with 0. Intensity is '-12', Bypassed is '-13'
newValue
the value. The range for Gain is 0.0 - 1.0, the Range for Pitch is -12.0 ... 12.0

setShouldKillRetriggeredNote.description: If set to true, this will kill retriggered notes (default).

setUseUniformVoiceHandler.description: Use a uniform voice index for the given container.

setVoiceGainValue.description: Applies a gain factor to a specified voice.

setVoicePitchValue.description: Applies a pitch factor (0.5 ... 2.0) to a specified voice.

startTimer.description: Starts the timer of the synth.

stopTimer.description: Stops the timer of the synth. You can call this also in the timer callback.
